title: texas war of independence
subject: texas war of independence
program_outcome: This syllabus explores the Texas War of Independence, covering the Texican identity, causes of the war, key political and military events, and significant historical figures.

classes.title: Introduction to the Texicans
classes.summary: This class introduces the Texicans and their cultural identity.
terminal: Identify who the Texicans were and describe their cultural background
enabling: Define the term 'Texican' and its origins
Discuss the settlement patterns and lifestyle of the Texicans
Explain the role of the Texicans in early Texas history

classes.title: Causes of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class examines the political and social causes of the war.
terminal: List the major causes of the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Identify political tensions between Texicans and the Mexican government
Discuss economic factors contributing to the conflict
Explain the impact of cultural differences on the rising tensions

classes.title: Major Battles of the Texas War of Independence
classes.summary: This class covers the key battles and military strategies during the war.
terminal: Describe the major battles of the Texas War of Independence and their outcomes
enabling: Identify key battles such as the Battle of the Alamo and the Battle of San Jacinto
Discuss the strategies used by both Texican and Mexican forces
Explain the significance of each battle in the context of the war

classes.title: Political Figures and Historical Impact
classes.summary: This class explores the political leaders and their roles in the war.
terminal: Identify key political figures and explain their contributions to the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the role of Sam Houston in the war
Describe the political strategies used by Texican leaders
Explain the impact of these figures on the outcome of the war

classes.title: Folk Lore and Cultural Legacy
classes.summary: This class delves into the folklore and cultural impact of the war.
terminal: Explain the cultural legacy and folklore surrounding the Texas War of Independence
enabling: Discuss the story and significance of the Yellow Rose of Texas
Examine other folk tales and their historical bases
Analyze how these stories have shaped Texan identity

classes.title: Sam Houston and the Rough Riders
classes.summary: This class focuses on Sam Houston's leadership and the Rough Riders' role.
terminal: Describe Sam Houston's leadership style and the role of the Rough Riders
enabling: Explain Sam Houston's military strategies and leadership qualities
Discuss the formation and actions of the Rough Riders
Analyze their contributions to the Texican victory

classes.title: The Republic of Texas
classes.summary: This class examines the establishment and governance of the Republic of Texas.
terminal: Describe the formation and governance of the Republic of Texas
enabling: Explain the transition from independence to the establishment of the Republic
Discuss the political structure and challenges faced by the Republic
Identify key figures in the Republic's government
